mano_cua.result_summary: 点击高亮区域内部可正确穿透到下方元素（鹦鹉图片链接成功导航到 Dribbble），但点击遮罩覆盖的非高亮区域时整个 tour 被关闭/dismissed（step 9），而非拦截点击。遮罩区域点击行为异常——预期应拦截点击不穿透，实际导致 tour 关闭。mano-cua 在第 22 步被停止（导航到外部链接后需要返回重新测试）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Click inside highlighted area correctly passes through to underlying element (parrot image link navigated to Dribbble). Click outside highlighted area on dark overlay dismissed the entire tour instead of being intercepted by the mask. This is a bug in mask click behavior.
